index.title: Component showcase
index.subtitle: Pick a view to open it.

register.title: Register
register.description: One form for sign up, sign in, and password reset. The country field on sign up calls the REST Countries API directly from the browser — no backend involved.

minesweeper.title: Minesweeper
minesweeper.description: Classic minesweeper. Pick a difficulty preset or build a custom square board, then clear it without hitting a mine.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Fill in your details below to get started.

signin.title: Welcome back
signin.subtitle: Sign in with your email and password.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.

fields.name: Name
fields.passwordHint: Use 8 or more characters with a mix of letters and numbers.

setup.title: Choose a board
setup.subtitle: Pick a difficulty preset or build your own square grid.
setup.customHint: Between {{min}} and {{max}} cells per side. The board is always square.
